title: adenostyles alliariae subsp. orientalis
intro: Adenostyles alliariae subsp. orientalis, also known as the Oriental greater hawk's-beard or Adenostyles orientalis, is a plant species within the Asteraceae family. It is a perennial herb that is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa, known for its medicinal properties and potential health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Adenostyles alliariae subsp. orientalis can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction, and is sometimes used in herbal remedies to support digestion, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system.
